item.title: About Jaekoo Kang, 강 재 구.
item.description: Email: jaekoo.jk@gmail.com Twitter: @jkang ResearchGate: Jaekoo Kang Education Ph.D. Candidate in Speech-Language-Hearing Sciences, The Graduate Center, City University of New York, USA. M.Phil., Speech-Language-Hearing Sciences, The Graduate Center, City University of New York, USA. M.A., English Linguistics (ABD), Korea University, Seoul, Korea. B.A., English Language and Literature, Korea University, Seoul, Korea. Recent Academic Experience Research Assistance, Speech-Production-Acoustics-Perception-Lab, CUNY Graduate Center (Link). Research Assistance, Haskins Laboratories (Link).
